name: weibo
description: China Twitter — trending topics, post search, post detail with comments, user profiles and timelines via Weibo internal AJAX APIs

dependencies.getHotTimeline → getPostDetail: hottimeline returns post mid used by getPostDetail
dependencies.getPostDetail → getPostComments: post detail shows comments_count; getPostComments fetches them by mid
dependencies.getUserProfile → getUserTimeline: profile returns uid used by getUserTimeline
dependencies.getHotSearch → searchPosts: hot search shows trending keywords usable as search queries
